# AvökatFinder Sweden
> The English-language directory of lawyers and law firms in Sweden for expats, foreign nationals and international businesses.

## Main Pages
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/: Home — find an English-speaking lawyer in Sweden
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/lawyers/: Directory of verified law firms and lawyers in Sweden
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/glossary/: Legal glossary — plain-English definitions of Sweden legal terms
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/blog/: Expat legal guides and property law articles for Sweden
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/about/: About AvökatFinder Sweden
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/contact/: Contact us

## Legal Glossary Terms
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/glossary/aktenskapsforord/
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/glossary/bodelning/
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/glossary/bostadsratt/
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/glossary/boutredningsman/
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/glossary/kopskontrakt-se/
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/glossary/lagfart/
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/glossary/pantbrev/
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/glossary/personnummer-se/
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/glossary/rattegangsfullmakt/
- https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/glossary/samboavtal/

## Site Info
- Language: English
- Audience: Expats, foreign nationals, international property buyers and businesses in Sweden
- Content: Law firm directory, legal glossary, expat legal guides
- Last updated: 2026-04-30
- Sitemap: https://sweden.avokatfinder.com/sitemap.xml
